inputs.label: Lambda (Scenario A)
inputs.businessContext: Average event rate for scenario A

inputs.label: k (Scenario A)
inputs.businessContext: Number of events for scenario A

inputs.label: Lambda (Scenario B)
inputs.businessContext: Average event rate for scenario B

inputs.label: k (Scenario B)
inputs.businessContext: Number of events for scenario B

formulas.probA: Math.exp(-lambdaA) * (lambdaA**kA) / ( (function fact(n){ return n <= 1 ? 1 : n * fact(n-1); })(kA) )
formulas.probB: Math.exp(-lambdaB) * (lambdaB**kB) / ( (function fact(n){ return n <= 1 ? 1 : n * fact(n-1); })(kB) )
